prompt_labels:
You are an expert document designer tasked with creating a visual representation of a document.

**Follow these instructions carefully:**

1.  **Visual Style:** Adhere strictly to the following visual style description:
    "A clean, modern, and data-focused infographic template with a grid-based structure, featuring clearly defined sections for a main title, introductory text, multiple chart placeholders suitable for comparative data (such as bar or area charts), and a legend area, utilizing an earthy green and brown color palette with a contrasting muted teal or subtle orange accent for data emphasis and Open Sans text readability, all on a smooth, untextured foreground with subtle, stylized leaf or tree iconography integrated sparingly."

2.  **Text Content:** Render the following text content within the document. Ensure all text is legible, well-formatted, and logically arranged according to its inherent structure (titles, sections, lists, etc.).
    ```text
    THEME CONCEIVED (ID: 1366): Sports and Fitness
Document Type: Infographic/Chart - Weekly Fitness Progress Tracker (TYPE: Infographic/Chart - Weekly Fitness Progress Tracker)

Main Title: My Weekly Fitness Tracker

Introduction:
Track your efforts, celebrate wins! Monitor weekly fitness and stay motivated.

Section: Workouts This Week
- Log exercise type.
- Note duration/intensity.
- Aim for consistency.

Section: Nutrition & Hydration
- Record water intake.
- Note healthy meals.
- Monitor energy.

Conclusion:
Great work! Review progress, set goals for next week.
    ```

3.  **Output:** Generate a single image of this document
